Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a complex hospital patient management process and asked to model it as a process tree We have the following operators sequence xor parallel loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The patient arrives A then must do registration RG then intake assessment IA This is a sequence After intake assessment there is a triage interview TI and then triage classification TC So TI then TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After triage classification there is an exclusive choice either comprehensive ECG CE or full blood panel FBP

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the initial diagnostic test either CE or FBP if the results are abnormal then we do SC then either TM or SPT then either FCE or FBA Then if the results are still abnormal we repeat the same steps until the results are normal

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In process trees loops are modeled with a silent step tau for the exit condition

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets denote the loop body as SC then treatment choice then rediagnostic choice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop body is actually a sequence of three steps SC then the treatment TM or SPT then the rediagnostic test either FCE or FBA

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can model this as initial test then xor between tau and the loop

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This tree means do the initial test then either take the silent step skip the loop or do the loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the loop when results are normal we do two activities in parallel AI and NC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After AI and NC are both completed we do a sequence FAS and then DDI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Finally we do three activities in parallel BL ICP and MRF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: The process tree is binary so we have to nest the parallel operators and sequence operators

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The entire process is initial sequence then initial diagnostic test then loop or skip then parallel AI and NC then sequence FAS and DDI then parallel BL ICP MRF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Lets break down the process into parts and build the tree from the bottom up

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Part 1 initial sequence A RG IA TI TC Part 2 initial test X CE FBP Part 3 loop body SC then xor TM SPT then xor FCE FBA Part 4 loop Part 5 parallel AI NC Part 6 sequence FAS DDI Part 7 parallel BL ICP MRF

Name: Validation - IND
Text: This should build the entire tree

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: We can reuse the same tau But note the tau in the loop and the tau in the xor are different We will create two tau nodes

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Lets assume the code is correct
